wellness.title: Arrive & Breathe
wellness.body: You've made it — well done. Before we head to the trail, take 3 slow breaths together. In for 4 counts, hold for 4, out for 6. Let the morning's rush settle. Today is about presence, not pace.

activity.title: Set an Intention
activity.body: As a team, each person shares one word for how they want to feel by the end of the walk. No wrong answers.

wellness.title: One Rock at a Time
wellness.body: This old quarry was cleared stone by stone. When everything feels like too much, it helps to do the same — pick one small thing and begin. Breathe, feel your feet on the ground, and let the pile shrink one rock at a time.

activity.title: Name the Boulder
activity.body: As a team, each person names one 'big rock' on their mind this week, then one small first step toward it. Say it out loud — a shared load is lighter.

wellness.title: Still Water
wellness.body: The quarry filled slowly into this quiet wetland — calm can grow from something once noisy and hard. Pause at the water's edge, soften your gaze, and let your breathing slow to match the stillness.

activity.title: Spot the Life
activity.body: Stand quietly for a minute and watch the water. As a team, count how many living things you can find — birds, fish, dragonflies. Nature rewards patience.

wellness.title: The Hidden Deck
wellness.body: You found it. Colugos glide between these trees at dusk, and durians drop without warning below. Reaching this secret earns you the Durian Dodger title. You left the obvious path and found something worth it — take the view in.

activity.title: Glide Like a Colugo
activity.body: A colugo travels by letting go and trusting the glide. Name one thing you've been gripping too tightly at work — then, just for this moment, let it go and enjoy the view.

wellness.title: Begin with Awareness
wellness.body: This is where the main trail starts. As you step onto the path, notice the change underfoot and the shade of the trees. Drop your shoulders, unclench your jaw, and let your pace slow to match the forest. The rest of the checkpoints reveal themselves from here.

activity.title: First Steps Together
activity.body: Head off as a team — no one walks alone. For the first minute, walk in silence and simply notice your breathing and the sounds around you.

wellness.title: Play is Good for You
wellness.body: Play lowers cortisol and boosts mood. You're allowed to be a kid for a minute. There's a playground right here — use it.

activity.title: The Swing Forfeit
activity.body: The teammate who has walked the LEAST distance so far takes the swing — and gets a cheer from the team. Everyone else takes the photo.

wellness.title: Widen Your View
wellness.body: Gazing at a wide, distant scene like the quarry relaxes the eyes and the nervous system. Soften your focus and take in the whole view for a moment.

activity.title: The Swing Forfeit
activity.body: The teammate who has walked the LEAST distance so far takes the swing at Lookout Point — and gets a cheer from the team. Everyone else takes the photo.

wellness.title: Arrive & Reflect
wellness.body: You've completed the loop — take that in. Notice how your body and mind feel now versus when you started. A walk in nature is one of the simplest, most reliable ways to reset. Carry a little of this calm back with you.

activity.title: Final Group Photo
activity.body: Gather the whole team for a group photo to mark the end of the walk. Snap it and upload it below — smiles mandatory.
